subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been revealed by the All-Wise unto them that have believed in God, the Peerless, the All-Informed, that He may draw them unto a station wherein the happenings of the world shall cause them no grief [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الحکیم لمن آمن بالله الفرد الخبیر لیجذبه الی مقام لاتحزنه حوادث العالم
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
